infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TrailLog needs access to your photo library to attach photos to log entries.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TrailLog needs access to your camera to take photos for log entries.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TrailLog uses your location to show your position on the map.
